# SEO Gangster

> SEO Gangster uses AI SEO agents to build pages, publish articles, and keep sites fresh with weekly updates.

## Canonical Site
- https://seogangster.ai

## Positioning
- Build the site. Keep it fresh.
- AI SEO agents for the weekly work search rankings actually need.
- Weekly freshness beats one-and-done publishing.
- Cheaper execution than bloated agency retainers or hiring bottlenecks.

## Intent Phrases
- AI SEO Agents
- Weekly SEO Updates
- Technical SEO Automation
- What Website Should I Use for SEO

## Credibility
- Started by Apple engineer and Waterloo graduate Shayan Arman.
- Shayan Arman worked at Apple on Siri from 2017 to 2021.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shayan-arman/

## Key Pages
- https://seogangster.ai/
- https://seogangster.ai/signup
- https://seogangster.ai/ai-seo-agents
- https://seogangster.ai/best-ai-seo-agent
- https://seogangster.ai/weekly-seo-updates
- https://seogangster.ai/what-website-should-i-use-for-seo
- https://seogangster.ai/seo-is-two-steps
- https://seogangster.ai/seo-agents-vs-seo-person
- https://seogangster.ai/seo-agents-vs-social-media-manager
- https://seogangster.ai/seo-agency-alternatives
- https://seogangster.ai/technical-seo-automation
- https://seogangster.ai/news
- https://seogangster.ai/about
- https://seogangster.ai/workflows

## Product Summary
- AI SEO page creation
- Weekly freshness updates
- Technical SEO automation
- Internal linking and schema follow-through
- Search-focused execution systems

## Crawl Endpoints
- robots: https://seogangster.ai/robots.txt
- sitemap: https://seogangster.ai/sitemap.xml
- feed: https://seogangster.ai/feed.xml
- site-facts: https://seogangster.ai/site-facts.json
